reviewer: Codex independent visual audit A (manual image-by-image review with original-resolution spot enlargement)

methodology.mode: Manual visual inspection at original resolution, with suspect assets enlarged individually.

decision_policy.KEEP: Every recipe component is visibly represented by sufficiently identifiable genuine Smucker’s Uncrustables packaging, and the live MAIN composition is acceptable against the owner-approved cooler reference.
decision_policy.REGENERATE: At least one blocking visual defect is present: missing recipe component, wrong product variant, unauthentic/generic packaging, contradictory package text, or absence of the owner-approved cooler shipping scene.
decision_policy.NEEDS_EVIDENCE: The available pixels are insufficient to reach a defensible KEEP or REGENERATE decision.

owner_approved_visual_standard: White EPS cooler in a three-quarter view with the lid behind it.
Ornate green Salutem emblem plus black wordmark/slogan.
Blue-header frozen gel packs; exactly four is preferred but not independently blocking.
Every selected recipe component must be present as the exact genuine product.
Products must be physically seated with no floating or pasted appearance.
No invented/lookalike packaging, retailer marks, product mismatch, or contradictory package claims.
important_interpretations: Otherwise-good older live images were not rejected merely for differing from the newly approved previews.
A recipe component is treated as absent when it is not visibly represented.
Generic package backs without readable Smucker’s/Uncrustables identity fail authentication.
Beamin’ Berry Blend is not accepted as a substitute for Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread.
Bright-Eyed Berry is accepted as the 12g Protein Strawberry variant.
Blackberry Boom and Burstin’ Blueberry were accepted where they visibly matched the selected genuine variants.
